THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEWSOM, BRENNAN JR. DBA MORTGAGE LOAN SPECIALISTS PER STIPULATION. SETTLED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STILL, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWSOM, BRENNAN JR. DBA MORTGAGE LOAN SPECIALISTS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
